name: card-vault
title: Card Vault
description: Securely store and manage your credit/debit card information
author: raycast

commands.name: index
commands.title: Card Vault
commands.description: Securely store and manage your credit/debit card information

preferences.name: workerBaseUrl
preferences.title: Worker Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Cloudflare Worker (e.g., https://card-vault-summary-api.YOUR.workers.dev)

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node dist/tests/expiry.test.js && node dist/tests/utilization.test.js && node dist/tests/audit.test.js && node dist/tests/storage_security.test.js
scripts.cf:migrate: cd cloudflare && wrangler d1 migrations apply card_vault --remote
scripts.cf:migrate:local: cd cloudflare && wrangler d1 migrations apply card_vault
